description: Turn evaluation or audit feedback into specific revision instructions, then re-execute the original step with feedback injected
usage: fix it, revise, improve based on feedback, apply the audit, refine this, make it better, iterate, redo with fixes

target.description: The deliverable to refine — matches the target used in the upstream audit or evaluate

scope.description: How many issues to address: top1 (single biggest fix), top3 (three highest-leverage changes), all (every issue found)
